flipkart.title: realme Buds T500 Pro True Wireless Earbuds
flipkart.description: High-performance true wireless earbuds equipped with 12.4mm titanium-plated drivers for rich bass and crystal-clear sound. Features up to 50dB active noise cancellation with adaptive modes, spatial audio for immersive listening, and up to 56 hours of total playback. Includes Bluetooth connectivity, low-latency gaming mode, and a lightweight ergonomic design for all-day comfort.

flipkart.title: BLUE HEAVEN Bridal Makeup Kit Luxe Edition (Pack of 15)
flipkart.description: All-in-one bridal makeup kit featuring 15 essential beauty products including foundation, lipstick, eyeshadow, compact, and more. Designed to create complete day-to-night looks, this kit is perfect for weddings, parties, and gifting. Offers a mix of vibrant and neutral shades suitable for different skin tones.

flipkart.title: CAMPUS Hurricane Running Shoes for Men
flipkart.description: Stylish and lightweight running shoes designed for maximum comfort and durability. Made with breathable mesh upper for ventilation and cushioned sole for shock absorption. The anti-slip outsole ensures better grip, making them ideal for running, gym workouts, and everyday casual wear.

flipkart.title: Fire-Boltt Ninja Talk Smartwatch
flipkart.description: Feature-packed smartwatch with a 1.39-inch HD round display and premium metal body. Supports Bluetooth calling, 120 sports modes, heart rate monitoring, SpO2 tracking, and sleep analysis. Designed for fitness enthusiasts and everyday users with long battery life and customizable watch faces.

flipkart.title: Mivi Fort H350 5.1 Channel Soundbar
flipkart.description: Powerful home audio system delivering 350W output with 5.1 channel surround sound for an immersive cinematic experience. Supports Bluetooth 5.1, AUX, USB, and HDMI inputs. Features multiple EQ modes to enhance music, movies, and gaming audio performance.

flipkart.title: M7 By Metronaut Printed Men Track Suit
flipkart.description: Comfortable and trendy men's tracksuit featuring a modern printed design. Made from soft, breathable fabric that ensures ease of movement. Ideal for workouts, jogging, travel, or casual wear with a stylish sporty look.

flipkart.title: ZUNBELLA 4X4 Remote Control Stunt Car
flipkart.description: Exciting remote control stunt car designed with 4x4 power and dual-sided driving capability. Performs 360-degree flips, spins, and high-speed stunts. Built with durable materials and strong grip wheels, perfect for indoor and outdoor play.

flipkart.title: SONY PlayStation 5 Slim Console (1TB)
flipkart.description: Next-generation gaming console featuring a compact slim design and 1TB storage capacity. Delivers ultra-fast load times with SSD, stunning 4K graphics, and immersive gameplay with advanced haptic feedback and adaptive triggers. Supports a wide range of exclusive and popular titles.

flipkart.title: Insta360 X4 Air Starter Bundle Action Camera
flipkart.description: Advanced 360-degree action camera with 29MP resolution for capturing immersive photos and videos. Features powerful stabilization, compact design, and easy portability. Ideal for travel, adventure sports, and content creation with high-quality output.

flipkart.title: FUJIFILM Instax Mini Evo Hybrid Instant Camera
flipkart.description: Premium hybrid instant camera that combines digital shooting with instant film printing. Features multiple lens effects and film styles for creative photography. Compact, stylish design with high-quality prints, perfect for capturing and sharing memories instantly.

flipkart.title: IZI GO-X 3-Axis Smartphone Gimbal Stabilizer
flipkart.description: Professional 3-axis handheld gimbal stabilizer designed for smooth and stable smartphone videography. Comes with an OLED display, built-in LED fill light, and multiple shooting modes. Ideal for vloggers, content creators, and mobile filmmakers.

amazon.title: Metal Leaf (Set of 3) Copper Antique Finish Wall Art Decorations
amazon.description: Elegant set of 3 metal leaf wall art pieces featuring a premium copper antique finish. Designed with a 3D sculpted look, these decorative pieces enhance the aesthetic of living rooms, bedrooms, offices, restaurants, and hotels. Lightweight, durable, and easy to mount, perfect for modern and classic interiors.

amazon.title: Nutricook 5L Air Fryer Slim (2025)
amazon.description: Compact and powerful 5-liter air fryer with 1500W performance for quick and healthy cooking. Features a 100% toxin-free ceramic coating free from PTFE, PFAS, and PFOA. Comes with a clear viewing window, built-in light, large basket, and 4 smart presets for easy cooking. Ideal for frying, baking, roasting, and grilling with minimal oil.

amazon.title: Godrej 1.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC
amazon.description: Energy-efficient 1.5 Ton inverter split air conditioner with 3-star rating and AI-powered cooling. Features 5-in-1 convertible modes, heavy-duty cooling even at 52°C, and durable copper condenser. Backed by a 5-year comprehensive warranty, making it ideal for Indian summers and long-term use.

amazon.title: Redmi A4 5G Smartphone
amazon.description: Affordable 5G smartphone featuring a large 6.88-inch display with 120Hz refresh rate for smooth visuals. Equipped with 4GB RAM, 128GB storage, and a 50MP dual camera setup for clear photos. Includes 18W fast charging with charger in the box, making it a great budget-friendly device for daily use.

amazon.title: boAt Hive Dashcam F1 (2026)

Features ADAS voice alerts, GPS route logging, Wi-Fi connectivity, 150° wide field of view, and smart parking monitoring for enhanced vehicle safety.

amazon.title: Xiaomi 55-inch X Pro Series QLED 4K Smart TV

amazon.title: VikriDA 8WD Gesture Sensor RC Robot Dog
amazon.description: High-performance remote control stunt car with 8-wheel drive and gesture sensor control. Features dynamic lights, music, and multi-directional movement including flips and spins. Designed for kids and adults, perfect for indoor and outdoor fun.

amazon.title: Apple iPhone Air 1TB
amazon.description: Premium ultra-slim smartphone featuring a 6.5-inch display with ProMotion up to 120Hz for smooth performance. Powered by the advanced A19 Pro chip for high-speed processing and efficiency.
